RuleFinding.description: A single rule's outcome for a single target.

target.description: What the rule was checking. For field rules, the field name; for item rules, 'item[N]' + field; for cross-sample rules, a stable tag.
target.title: Target

reason.description: Human-readable explanation, mostly populated on FAIL or NOT_APPLICABLE.
reason.title: Reason

expected.description: For numeric rules, the computed expected value (makes failures inspectable).
expected.title: Expected

observed.description: For numeric rules, the actual observed value.
observed.title: Observed

RuleFinding.title: RuleFinding

RuleOutcome.description: The three-state result of a validation rule.
RuleOutcome.title: RuleOutcome

description: Collection of rule findings from running the validation engine on one invoice.

source.description: Who produced this result (for audit trails).
source.title: Source

title: ValidationResult
